results.title: Situational Awareness: The 25 year old taking on Wall St
excerpts:
Section Title: ... > A deep dive into Leopold Aschenbrenner's L/S Equity Portfolio
Content:
But even better - Situational Awareness LP’s 13F filing just dropped - so we can see what he’s holding.
So how is a 25 year old taking on the Titans of Wall St? And will his strategy succeed if the AI bubble pops?
*Let’s begin.*
Drop your email to never miss an update :))
Subscribe

Section Title: Situational Awareness: The 25 year old taking on Wall St > ... > Discussion about this post
Content:
Comments Restacks
[](https://substack.com/profile/141520032-hedgefundpm?utm_source=comment)
[HedgeFundPM](https://substack.com/profile/141520032-hedgefundpm?utm_source=substack-feed-item)
[Mar 16](https://capitalists.substack.com/p/situational-awareness-the-25-year/comment/228767377 "Mar 16, 2026, 7:26 PM")
All of that, just to miss a major factor. His ADV as of Feb 2026 shows $383mm AUM. 13F filing is $5.5bln. 13F is NOT aum. It is just his gross exposure, and does not report shorts. He has a massive gross book, and is probably massively levered.
Hope this helps,
Signed - dinosaur wall st investor (who has seen levered bets blow up)

results.title: What One Former OpenAI Researcher's SEC Filing Tells You About The Real AI Race
excerpts:
Section Title: What One Former OpenAI Researcher's SEC Filing Tells You About The Real AI Race
Content:
The fund he was pointing to belongs to [Leopold Aschenbrenner](https://fortune.com/2026/03/05/leopold-aschenbrenner-ai-hedge-fund-superintelligence-agi-power-companies-crypto-miners/) , a former OpenAI researcher fired from the company's superalignment team in 2024. Rather than retreating, Aschenbrenner launched Situational Awareness LP, a San Francisco-based hedge fund built directly on the thesis of his [165-page 2024 essay](https://situational-awareness.ai/) by the same name, which argued that AGI was coming faster than governments and investors understood, and that the U.S. needed to act accordingly.
Section Title: ... > From Essay to $5.5 Billion in Equity Exposure
Content:
The fund started with anchor commitments from Patrick and John Collison, founders of Stripe, along with Nat Friedman and Daniel Gross. According to [Fortune](https://fortune.com/2026/03/05/leopold-aschenbrenner-ai-hedge-fund-superintelligence-agi-power-companies-crypto-miners/) , Situational Awareness now reports roughly $5.5 billion in U.S. equity exposure across approximately 30 holdings. That figure represents its 13F-disclosed long position book; actual AUM, per the fund's Form ADV, is reported at $383 million, as 13F filings capture gross long exposure including leverage, not total assets under management.
 ... 
Section Title: ... > What VCs Should Take From This
Content:
For VCs, the relevance is structural. Most early-stage funds cannot own Bloom Energy or CoreWeave directly at scale. But they can use the Situational Awareness portfolio as a map: the companies being seeded today that will eventually become suppliers to, customers of, or competitors with that infrastructure layer are where the next decade of venture alpha lives.
Aschenbrenner’s essay opened with a line that summarized his view: you can see the future first in San Francisco. His 13F filings suggest he is already positioned there.
[Editorial Standards](https://www.forbes.com/sites/forbesstaff/article/forbes-editorial-values-and-standards/) [Reprints & Permissions](https://www.parsintl.com/publications/forbes/)

results.title: Ex OpenAI Leopold Aschenbrenner 4 MAIN AI Bets to grow $1B to $5.5B in 1 year
excerpts:
Section Title: ... > Leopold Aschenbrenner went from writing “Situational Awareness: The Decade Ahead”
Content:
to building a fund that basically trades the bottlenecks of the AI buildout
[](https://substack.com/@guillermoflor)
[Guillermo Flor](https://substack.com/@guillermoflor)
Mar 05, 2026
∙ Paid
18
3
Share
[](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!ivxj!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Ffd77c2c8-e759-4bcd-9474-75161c1e7e51_1130x1024.png)
Some people get lucky once.
Leopold Aschenbrenner looks like someone who **engineered** luck.
In a very short window, he went from being a young OpenAI insider with a reputation for sharp thinking to publishing a **165-page essay** laying out a decade-long AI thesis (“Situational Awareness: The Decade Ahead”), and then **building an investment vehicle that expressed that thesis in markets.**
Section Title: ... > Leopold Aschenbrenner went from writing “Situational Awareness: The Decade Ahead”
Content:
The numbers are hard to ignore: by the end of 2025, his fund’s **public 13F long U.S. equity book** alone was in the **multi-billion** range (this is not total AUM, but the SEC-reported public equities snapshot).
So I did what I always do when someone prints that kind of outcome:
**I reverse-engineered the playbook.**
[](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!De49!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F2101bf8e-4ceb-4fd5-b51b-cfdcb76a5356_525x301.png)

results.title: Leopold Aschenbrenner’s hedge fund is betting on power and Bitcoin miners to fuel the AI boom | Fortune
excerpts:
Section Title: Why Leopold Aschenbrenner’s AI hedge fund is betting big on power companies and Bitcoin miners to...
Content:
At the time of *Fortune* ’s reporting last October, Situational Awareness LP’s publicly disclosed holdings already pointed to a broad thesis around AI infrastructure. The fund held large positions in semiconductor companies such as [Intel](https://fortune.com/company/intel/) and [Broadcom](https://fortune.com/company/broadcom/) , as well as the VanEck Semiconductor ETF, alongside major power producers including [Vistra](https://fortune.com/company/vistra-energy/) and [Constellation Energy](https://fortune.com/company/constellation-energy/) .

results.title: Why Leopold Aschenbrenner’s AI hedge fund is betting big on power companies and Bitcoin miners to fuel the ‘superintelligence’ race
excerpts:
Section Title: Why Leopold Aschenbrenner’s AI hedge fund is betting big on power companies and Bitcoin miners to...
Content:
Sharon Goldman
March 5, 2026 4 min read
BTC-USD
When *Fortune* [profiled](https://fortune.com/2025/10/08/leopold-aschenbrenner-openai-ftx-1-5-billion-hedge-fund-situational-awareness/) Leopold Aschenbrenner in October 2025, the former OpenAI researcher—famously fired after roughly a year at the company—and onetime member of FTX’s Future Fund philanthropy team was best known for a self-published 165-page monograph titled “Situational Awareness: The Decade Ahead.” That essay, published in 2024, argued that governments and investors needed to recognize how quickly AGI, or artificial general intelligence, could arrive—and what was at stake if the U.S. fell behind.
 ... 
Section Title: Why Leopold Aschenbrenner’s AI hedge fund is betting big on power companies and Bitcoin miners to...
Content:
Now, new filings reveal where the 24-year-old Aschenbrenner is placing those bets—and just how quickly the fund has grown. Situational Awareness now reports roughly $5.5 billion in U.S. equity exposure, spread across nearly 30 holdings. According to a spokesperson, Aschenbrenner has invested almost all of his own net worth in the fund, which counts West Coast founders, family offices, institutions, and endowments among its investors.
Section Title: Why Leopold Aschenbrenner’s AI hedge fund is betting big on power companies and Bitcoin miners to...
Content:
At the time of *Fortune* ’s reporting last October, Situational Awareness LP’s publicly disclosed holdings already pointed to a broad thesis around AI infrastructure. The fund held large positions in semiconductor companies such as [Intel](https://fortune.com/company/intel/) and [Broadcom](https://fortune.com/company/broadcom/) , as well as the VanEck Semiconductor ETF, alongside major power producers including [Vistra](https://fortune.com/company/vistra-energy/) and [Constellation Energy](https://fortune.com/company/constellation-energy/) .
 ... 
Section Title: Why Leopold Aschenbrenner’s AI hedge fund is betting big on power companies and Bitcoin miners to...
Content:
The latest filings suggest the strategy is sharpening around those same themes—particularly electricity generation and companies that control large pools of computing power. Among the new or expanded positions are Bloom Energy, a fuel-cell power company that is now the fund’s single largest holding; CoreWeave, an AI cloud infrastructure provider; and Cipher Mining, another large crypto-mining firm.
Section Title: Why Leopold Aschenbrenner’s AI hedge fund is betting big on power companies and Bitcoin miners to...
Content:
As with any hedge fund, the picture is incomplete. Public 13F filings disclose only long positions in U.S.-listed stocks; short positions, derivatives, and international investments remain hidden. Still, the portfolio suggests a clear thesis: Aschenbrenner appears to be betting that the most valuable assets in the AI era may not be algorithms, but electricity and computing power. Rather than betting primarily on the companies building AI models—such as OpenAI, Anthropic, or Google—Situational Awareness is betting that the real bottlenecks in the AI boom will be electricity generation and computing capacity.
